channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scholar defends critical race theory after coining the term
item.description: KimberlÃ© Williams Crenshaw contributed to intersectionality and critical race theory. Her memoir details these concepts.

item.title: Iran conflict impacts jet fuel prices, affecting air travelers
item.description: Rising fuel costs, airlines' second-largest expense, are linked to the U.S.-Iran conflict. Airlines are exploring strategies to manage these increased costs.

item.title: Deployment Impacts Military Families
item.description: Families in Norfolk, Virginia, anticipate the return of approximately 15,000 sailors and Marines as the USS Ford concludes a deployment exceeding 10 months.

item.title: NPR's Search for Polymarket's Headquarters
item.description: Polymarket, a prediction market, relocated its headquarters to Panama after regulatory action in 2022.
